summary: Ran three repo-local operational validation iterations against a live localhost prototype surface, provider contract, gate state, evidence integrity, and green reliability artifacts; aggregate pass true with zero provider drift.
recommendation_for_human: Proceed to Gate E operational review; do not treat this validation as permission for external repo mutation, paid provider calls, deploy, PR creation, yellow auto-approval, or production side effects.
notes: Validation used only repo-local artifacts and an ephemeral localhost HTTP server.
Provider path remained API-compatible local stub; no paid provider was called.
